title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Plan of the Municipality of Los Baños Amounting to One Million Pesos ( P 1,000,000.00) Under the Program Damayan sa Kapwa Laban sa Covid-19 in Particular Tulong at Lingap sa Kapasada. Author (s) : Councilor (s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Loares, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/17/22)
